title: Add checkout total fixture

review.patch:
diff --git a/src/lib.rs b/src/lib.rs
index 1..2 100644
--- a/src/lib.rs
+++ b/src/lib.rs
@@ -10,3 +10,4 @@
 fn total(items: &[u32]) -> u32 {
-    items.iter().sum()
+    items.iter().map(|x| x * 2).sum()
+    // double-counts every item
 }

notes: Reviewers flagged the double-counting in the diff.
